note: Because a standardized global definition is used instead of national administrative ones, the figures may differ from those reported by countries.
title: Share of the urban population who live in the largest city
subtitle: Share of urban population (the sum of [cities](#dod:cities-degurba) and [towns and suburbs](#dod:towns-degurba)) living in the largest city. [Cities](#dod:cities-degurba) are identified using satellite imagery and population data, applying the same density and size thresholds across all countries.
